summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 19 warning, 17 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/run.mjs:437` тАФ `planTasks()` discards runbook `flow` field; flow selection at line 1004 runs independently via `selectFlow()`, ignoring any runbook-specified flow. Wire or remove.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/run.mjs:441` тАФ `hint` field propagated through 3 functions and 2 modules to task objects but `buildTaskBrief()` never reads it. Dead-end data path.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:105` тАФ `isSafeRegex` heuristic catches nested quantifiers but not overlapping alternations (`(a|a)+`) or polynomial-time patterns. Must upgrade before untrusted sources.
ЁЯЯб `SPEC.md` тАФ Schema diverged: SPEC says `pattern`/`keywords`/`threshold`, implementation ships `patterns`/`minScore`. Implementation is better but SPEC is misleading.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/run.mjs:420` тАФ Default `runbooksDir` uses `process.cwd()` while caller stores `mainCwd` at line 817. Could diverge in daemon mode.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:213` тАФ `scoreRunbook` crashes on null/undefined description (`description.toLowerCase()` throws TypeError). Guard needed.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/run.mjs:500` тАФ `buildTaskBrief` never reads `task.hint`. Runbook hints flow through the entire pipeline and are silently discarded. Highest-impact improvement to wire in.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:188` тАФ `flow` field loaded but never consumed downstream. Dead data path.
ЁЯЯб `test/runbooks.test.mjs` тАФ No integration test for `planTasks()` тЖТ runbook code path. Highest-risk untested seam.
ЁЯЯб `SPEC.md:34-53` тАФ Schema diverged from spec without update. Implementation uses `patterns`/`minScore` instead of spec's `pattern`/`keywords`/`threshold`. Update the spec.

ЁЯЯб `SPEC.md:23` (AC #5) тАФ Behavioral deviation. Spec says "regex narrows candidates before keyword scoring." Implementation uses additive scoring тАФ both contribute to one total score. Not a two-phase filter.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/run.mjs:441` тАФ **`hint` is a dead-end data path.** All 3 built-in runbooks include per-task hints (e.g., "Define flags, positional args, and --help output") that flow through the pipeline but `buildTaskBrief` never shows them to the agent. This is the single highest-impact fix to make.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:188` тАФ `flow` field loaded from YAML but never consumed by flow selection. Dead data.
ЁЯЯб `test/runbooks.test.mjs` тАФ No integration test for `planTasks()` тЖТ runbook code path. Highest-risk untested seam.
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:213 тАФ `scoreRunbook` crashes on null/undefined description (`description.toLowerCase()` TypeError); reachable from `planTasks()`. Add `if (!description) return 0;` guard.
ЁЯЯб test/runbooks.test.mjs тАФ No integration test for `planTasks()` тЖТ runbook matching path. This is the highest-risk untested seam тАФ the SPEC Testing Strategy explicitly calls for it.

ЁЯЯб test/runbooks.test.mjs тАФ No test for `--runbook nonexistent` CLI fallthrough (SPEC AC #8). Unit test covers `selectRunbook` return value but not the console warning or actual brainstorm fallthrough.
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/run.mjs:437 тАФ Runbook `flow` field loaded and stored but never consumed downstream. Dead data propagated through 3 functions.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs`:110 тАФ `isSafeRegex` heuristic misses alternation-based ReDoS patterns like `(a|a)+$`. Verified: bypasses the guard and causes 4.3s backtracking on 25 chars. Fix: detect alternation in quantified groups, add regex timeout, or use `safe-regex2`.

ЁЯФ┤ `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:188` тАФ Gold-plating: `flow` field stored but never consumed by any production code; not in SPEC.md; none of the 3 built-in runbooks use it. Delete `flow: doc.flow || null` and the test at `test/runbooks.test.mjs:96-106`.
